entities.name: Format Strings
entities.context: Specification pattern in registry that defines exact structure of output markdown

relationships.context: Registry is stored within N5 preferences system
Each block in registry has a format field specifying output structure
Zo instances reference registry when generating Smart Blocks
Zo instances are the processors that generate Smart Blocks
Smart Blocks are structured according to format string specifications
